title: Rep. David Scott, Georgia Democrat, Dies at 80
summary: Rep. David Scott, D-Ga., the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has passed away.
charlotte_impact: Scott's death marks a loss of a key figure in agricultural policy and Georgia's representation in Congress.
